name: Mobile Mode - mobile sites + device emulation on desktop
description: Toolbar popup to get mobile on desktop. Chrome/Edge: full - 'Device mode' is true DevTools-style viewport emulation (debugger API) that reflows ANY site, plus 'Mobile UA only' (no banner). Firefox: 'Mobile UA only' works; for true reflow use Firefox's built-in Responsive Design Mode (Ctrl+Shift+M) since Firefox has no extension API for viewport emulation.
